subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Prisoner unto him who hath been guided by the lights of God and desireth to enter the pavilion of glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی اهتدی بانوار الله و اراد ان یدخل خباء المجد
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
